calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-10-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Approval Of Settlement Of Claim For Civil Penalties Under Labor Code 2698 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
David Sohn, Esq. of Sohn Legal Group PC, T:415.421.1300, for plaintiff and moving party;
Spencer J. Davidson, Esq. of Jackson Lewis PC, T:415.394.9400, for defendant, by Court Call.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ROBERT HUDSON's Motion For Approval Of Settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown per Labor Code 2698 et seq.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2017 Set For Trial On May-14-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
